name: Marketing Funnel Health
description: Consolidated Marketing funnel view: traffic, contacts, QLs, SAL conversion. Migrated from fusion-analytics. Now with tabs, heatmap, and spike alerts.

panels.title: Page Performance — New Visitors → Signup → MQL/SAL
panels.sql:
-- Prior-pageview lookback trimmed from 365d → 60d to stay under 750GB billed cap.
-- A visitor seen in the prior 60 days is treated as returning; otherwise new.
WITH range_pvs AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    CONCAT('https://www.builder.io',
      COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(url, r'https?://(?:www\.)?builder\.io(/[^?#]*)'), '/')
    ) AS base_url,
    JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') AS visitor_id,
    MIN(createdDate) OVER (
      PARTITION BY JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId'),
      CONCAT('https://www.builder.io', COALESCE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(url, r'https?://(?:www\.)?builder\.io(/[^?#]*)'), '/'))
    ) AS first_page_visit
  FROM {{EVENTS}}
  WHERE event = 'pageView'
    AND url LIKE '%jami.studio%'
    AND JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') IS NOT NULL
    AND createdDate >= TIMESTAMP('{{dateStart}}')
    AND createdDate <  TIMESTAMP_ADD(TIMESTAMP('{{dateEnd}}'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    AND createdDate <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
),
prior_pvs AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') AS visitor_id
  FROM {{EVENTS}}
  WHERE event = 'pageView'
    AND url LIKE '%jami.studio%'
    AND JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') IS NOT NULL
    AND createdDate >= TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(DATE('{{dateStart}}'), INTERVAL 60 DAY))
    AND createdDate <  TIMESTAMP('{{dateStart}}')
    AND createdDate <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
),
new_pvs AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT rp.base_url, rp.visitor_id, rp.first_page_visit
  FROM range_pvs rp
  LEFT JOIN prior_pvs pp ON rp.visitor_id = pp.visitor_id
  WHERE pp.visitor_id IS NULL
),
visitor_signups AS (
  SELECT
    JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') AS visitor_id,
    MIN(createdDate) AS signed_up_at
  FROM {{EVENTS}}
  WHERE event = 'signup'
    AND JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') IS NOT NULL
    AND createdDate >= TIMESTAMP('{{dateStart}}')
    AND createdDate <= TIMESTAMP_ADD(TIMESTAMP('{{dateEnd}}'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
    AND createdDate <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
  GROUP BY 1
),
hs AS (
  SELECT
    b_visitor_id AS visitor_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN company_fit_score >= 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_icp,
    MAX(CASE WHEN date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_mql,
    MAX(CASE WHEN date_entered_sal IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_sal,
    1 AS is_hs_contact
  FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}}
  WHERE b_visitor_id IS NOT NULL AND b_visitor_id != ''
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  np.base_url,
  COUNT(DISTINCT np.visitor_id) AS new_visitors,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN vs.signed_up_at IS NOT NULL AND vs.signed_up_at <= TIMESTAMP_ADD(np.first_page_visit, INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN np.visitor_id END) AS signups,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN vs.signed_up_at IS NOT NULL AND vs.signed_up_at <= TIMESTAMP_ADD(np.first_page_visit, INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN np.visitor_id END),
    COUNT(DISTINCT np.visitor_id)
  ) * 100, 1) AS pct_signups,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN hs.is_hs_contact = 1 THEN np.visitor_id END) AS mkt_contacts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN hs.is_icp = 1 THEN np.visitor_id END) AS icp_signups,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN hs.is_mql = 1 THEN np.visitor_id END) AS mql,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN hs.is_sal = 1 THEN np.visitor_id END) AS sal
FROM new_pvs np
LEFT JOIN visitor_signups vs ON np.visitor_id = vs.visitor_id
LEFT JOIN hs ON np.visitor_id = hs.visitor_id
GROUP BY 1
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT np.visitor_id) >= 3
ORDER BY new_visitors DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Blog → Signups (7-day first-touch attribution)
panels.sql:
WITH blog_meta AS (
  SELECT handle, pub_date FROM (
    SELECT
      REGEXP_EXTRACT(SUOHFYGIOG, r'/blog/([^/?#]+)') AS handle,
      FIRST_VALUE(ZZJ6XRJAII) OVER (PARTITION BY REGEXP_EXTRACT(SUOHFYGIOG, r'/blog/([^/?#]+)') ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC) AS pub_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY REGEXP_EXTRACT(SUOHFYGIOG, r'/blog/([^/?#]+)') ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC) AS _rn
    FROM {{SIGMA_BLOG}}
    WHERE SUOHFYGIOG IS NOT NULL
      AND REGEXP_EXTRACT(SUOHFYGIOG, r'/blog/([^/?#]+)') IS NOT NULL
  ) WHERE _rn = 1
),
blog_visits AS (
  SELECT
    JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') AS visitor_id,
    REGEXP_EXTRACT(url, r'/blog/([^/?#]+)') AS slug,
    MIN(createdDate) AS first_blog_visit
  FROM {{EVENTS}}
  WHERE event = 'pageView'
    AND url LIKE '%/blog/%'
    AND JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') IS NOT NULL
    AND createdDate >= TIMESTAMP('{{dateStart}}')
    AND createdDate <= TIMESTAMP('{{dateEnd}}')
    AND createdDate <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
visitor_signups AS (
  SELECT
    JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') AS visitor_id,
    MIN(createdDate) AS signed_up_at
  FROM {{EVENTS}}
  WHERE event = 'signup'
    AND JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') IS NOT NULL
    AND createdDate >= TIMESTAMP('{{dateStart}}')
    AND createdDate <= TIMESTAMP_ADD(TIMESTAMP('{{dateEnd}}'), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
    AND createdDate <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  bm.handle AS blog_post,
  CAST(bm.pub_date AS STRING) AS pub_date,
  COUNT(DISTINCT bv.visitor_id) AS traffic,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE(vs.signed_up_at) BETWEEN DATE(bv.first_blog_visit) AND DATE_ADD(DATE(bv.first_blog_visit), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN vs.visitor_id END) AS signups,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE(vs.signed_up_at) BETWEEN DATE(bv.first_blog_visit) AND DATE_ADD(DATE(bv.first_blog_visit), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN vs.visitor_id END),
    NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT bv.visitor_id), 0)
  ) * 100, 2) AS signup_pct
FROM blog_visits bv
INNER JOIN blog_meta bm ON bv.slug = bm.handle
LEFT JOIN visitor_signups vs ON bv.visitor_id = vs.visitor_id
WHERE bm.pub_date >= '{{dateStart}}'
GROUP BY bm.handle, bm.pub_date
ORDER BY signups DESC, traffic DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: AI Referrer Signups (weekly trend)
panels.sql:
WITH visitor_signups AS (
  SELECT JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') AS visitor_id, MIN(createdDate) AS signed_up_at
  FROM {{EVENTS}}
  WHERE event = 'signup' AND JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') IS NOT NULL
    AND createdDate >= TIMESTAMP('{{dateStart}}')
    AND createdDate <= TIMESTAMP('{{dateEnd}}')
    AND createdDate <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
  GROUP BY 1
),
ai_pageviews AS (
  SELECT
    JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') AS visitor_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(data, '$.referrerUrl'), JSON_VALUE(data, '$.initialReferrer')) AS referrer
  FROM {{EVENTS}}
  WHERE event = 'pageView' AND JSON_VALUE(data, '$.visitorId') IS NOT NULL
    AND createdDate >= TIMESTAMP('{{dateStart}}')
    AND createdDate <= TIMESTAMP('{{dateEnd}}')
    AND createdDate <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
    AND (
      LOWER(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(data, '$.referrerUrl'), JSON_VALUE(data, '$.initialReferrer'))) LIKE '%chatgpt%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(data, '$.referrerUrl'), JSON_VALUE(data, '$.initialReferrer'))) LIKE '%chat.openai%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(data, '$.referrerUrl'), JSON_VALUE(data, '$.initialReferrer'))) LIKE '%perplexity%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(data, '$.referrerUrl'), JSON_VALUE(data, '$.initialReferrer'))) LIKE '%claude%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(data, '$.referrerUrl'), JSON_VALUE(data, '$.initialReferrer'))) LIKE '%gemini%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(data, '$.referrerUrl'), JSON_VALUE(data, '$.initialReferrer'))) LIKE '%bard.google%'
      OR LOWER(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(data, '$.referrerUrl'), JSON_VALUE(data, '$.initialReferrer'))) LIKE '%copilot%'
    )
)
SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', DATE_TRUNC(DATE(s.signed_up_at), WEEK(MONDAY))) AS week,
  CASE
    WHEN LOWER(pv.referrer) LIKE '%chatgpt%' OR LOWER(pv.referrer) LIKE '%chat.openai%' THEN 'ChatGPT'
    WHEN LOWER(pv.referrer) LIKE '%perplexity%' THEN 'Perplexity'
    WHEN LOWER(pv.referrer) LIKE '%claude%' THEN 'Claude'
    WHEN LOWER(pv.referrer) LIKE '%gemini%' OR LOWER(pv.referrer) LIKE '%bard.google%' THEN 'Gemini'
    WHEN LOWER(pv.referrer) LIKE '%copilot%' OR LOWER(pv.referrer) LIKE '%bing%' THEN 'Copilot/Bing'
    ELSE 'Other AI'
  END AS ai_source,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.visitor_id) AS signups
FROM visitor_signups s
JOIN ai_pageviews pv ON s.visitor_id = pv.visitor_id
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: Weekly Contacts Created — by Persona
panels.sql:
WITH contact_job_functions AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(hs_object_id AS INT64) AS contact_id,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')), '[') THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(INITCAP(TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(jobfunctions, r'"([^"]+)"'))), ''), 'Unknown')
      WHEN STRPOS(COALESCE(jobfunctions, ''), ';') > 0 THEN INITCAP(TRIM(SPLIT(jobfunctions, ';')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]))
      WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')) NOT IN ('', 'null', '[]') THEN INITCAP(TRIM(jobfunctions))
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS job_function
  FROM {{HS_RAW}}
)
SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', DATE_TRUNC(DATE(c.sign_up_time_stamp), WEEK(MONDAY))) AS week,
  COALESCE(cjf.job_function, 'Unknown') AS persona,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) AS contacts
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN contact_job_functions cjf ON c.contact_id = cjf.contact_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT CAST(company_id AS INT64) AS company_id
  FROM {{ENT_COMPANIES}}
  WHERE account_profile = 'Enterprise Active Customer'
) aec ON CAST(c.company_id AS INT64) = aec.company_id
WHERE c.sign_up_time_stamp >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND c.sign_up_time_stamp <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  AND c.sign_up_time_stamp <= CURRENT_DATE()
  AND aec.company_id IS NULL
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY week

panels.title: Fit Score Distribution
panels.sql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN c.company_fit_score IS NULL OR c.company_fit_score < 4 THEN 'Ineligible (<4)'
    WHEN c.company_fit_score <= 5 THEN 'Eligible (4-5)'
    WHEN c.company_fit_score <= 7 THEN 'Eligible (6-7)'
    ELSE 'Full Weight (8+)'
  END AS fit_bucket,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) AS contacts
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT CAST(company_id AS INT64) AS company_id
  FROM {{ENT_COMPANIES}}
  WHERE account_profile = 'Enterprise Active Customer'
) aec ON CAST(c.company_id AS INT64) = aec.company_id
WHERE c.sign_up_time_stamp >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND c.sign_up_time_stamp <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  AND c.sign_up_time_stamp <= CURRENT_DATE()
  AND aec.company_id IS NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY CASE fit_bucket
  WHEN 'Full Weight (8+)' THEN 1
  WHEN 'Eligible (6-7)' THEN 2
  WHEN 'Eligible (4-5)' THEN 3
  ELSE 4
END

panels.title: Enrichment Funnel — Total → Personal Email → Sent to Clay → Enriched
panels.sql:
WITH contact_job_functions AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(hs_object_id AS INT64) AS contact_id,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')), '[') THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(INITCAP(TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(jobfunctions, r'"([^"]+)"'))), ''), 'Unknown')
      WHEN STRPOS(COALESCE(jobfunctions, ''), ';') > 0 THEN INITCAP(TRIM(SPLIT(jobfunctions, ';')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]))
      WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')) NOT IN ('', 'null', '[]') THEN INITCAP(TRIM(jobfunctions))
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS job_function
  FROM {{HS_RAW}}
),
active_enterprise_companies AS (
  SELECT CAST(company_id AS INT64) AS company_id
  FROM {{ENT_COMPANIES}}
  WHERE account_profile = 'Enterprise Active Customer'
),
contacts_base AS (
  SELECT
    c.contact_id,
    CASE
      WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(cjf.job_function, 'Unknown')) = 'developer' THEN 'Developer'
      WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(cjf.job_function, 'Unknown')) = 'designer' THEN 'Designer'
      ELSE 'Other'
    END AS funnel_segment,
    COALESCE(r.personal_email_, FALSE) AS is_personal_email,
    (r.city_clay IS NOT NULL OR r.company_domain_clay IS NOT NULL OR r.phone_number_clay IS NOT NULL OR r.work_email_clay IS NOT NULL) AS sent_to_clay,
    (r.work_email_clay IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(r.work_email_clay) NOT IN ('', 'null', 'NULL')) AS is_enriched
  FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
  LEFT JOIN contact_job_functions cjf ON c.contact_id = cjf.contact_id
  LEFT JOIN {{HS_RAW}} r ON CAST(r.hs_object_id AS INT64) = c.contact_id
  LEFT JOIN active_enterprise_companies aec ON CAST(c.company_id AS INT64) = aec.company_id
  WHERE c.sign_up_time_stamp >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
    AND c.sign_up_time_stamp <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
    AND c.sign_up_time_stamp <= CURRENT_DATE()
    AND aec.company_id IS NULL
)
SELECT
  funnel_segment,
  COUNT(DISTINCT contact_id) AS total,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_personal_email THEN contact_id END) AS personal_email,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sent_to_clay THEN contact_id END) AS sent_to_clay,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_enriched THEN contact_id END) AS enriched
FROM contacts_base
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY CASE funnel_segment WHEN 'Developer' THEN 1 WHEN 'Designer' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END

panels.title: Contacts Needing Review (Fit 4+, target persona, QL Score <7)
panels.sql:
WITH contact_job_functions AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(hs_object_id AS INT64) AS contact_id,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')), '[') THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(INITCAP(TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(jobfunctions, r'"([^"]+)"'))), ''), 'Unknown')
      WHEN STRPOS(COALESCE(jobfunctions, ''), ';') > 0 THEN INITCAP(TRIM(SPLIT(jobfunctions, ';')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]))
      WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')) NOT IN ('', 'null', '[]') THEN INITCAP(TRIM(jobfunctions))
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS job_function
  FROM {{HS_RAW}}
),
active_enterprise_companies AS (
  SELECT CAST(company_id AS INT64) AS company_id FROM {{ENT_COMPANIES}} WHERE account_profile = 'Enterprise Active Customer'
)
SELECT
  TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(r.firstname, ''), ' ', COALESCE(r.lastname, ''))) AS contact_name,
  c.email,
  c.company,
  COALESCE(cjf.job_function, 'Unknown') AS persona,
  c.company_fit_score AS fit,
  CAST(SAFE_CAST(r.new_2026_ql_score AS FLOAT64) AS FLOAT64) AS ql_score,
  COALESCE(c.channel, 'Unknown') AS lead_source,
  DATE(c.sign_up_time_stamp) AS created
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN contact_job_functions cjf ON c.contact_id = cjf.contact_id
LEFT JOIN {{HS_RAW}} r ON CAST(r.hs_object_id AS INT64) = c.contact_id
LEFT JOIN active_enterprise_companies aec ON CAST(c.company_id AS INT64) = aec.company_id
WHERE c.company_fit_score >= 4
  AND (SAFE_CAST(r.new_2026_ql_score AS FLOAT64) IS NULL OR SAFE_CAST(r.new_2026_ql_score AS FLOAT64) < 7)
  AND cjf.job_function IS NOT NULL AND cjf.job_function != 'Unknown'
  AND DATE(c.sign_up_time_stamp) >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND DATE(c.sign_up_time_stamp) <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  AND aec.company_id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.company_fit_score DESC, COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(r.new_2026_ql_score AS FLOAT64), 0) DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: QL Spike Detection
panels.sql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    date AS d,
    SUM(IFNULL(num_qls, 0)) AS qls
  FROM {{REVENUE_FUNNEL}}
  WHERE date >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
    AND date <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  GROUP BY 1
),
stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(qls) AS avg_qls FROM daily
)
SELECT
  CONCAT(
    'Spike on ', CAST(daily.d AS STRING), ': ',
    CAST(daily.qls AS STRING), ' QLs (',
    CAST(ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(daily.qls, stats.avg_qls), 1) AS STRING),
    'x daily average) — likely bulk import.'
  ) AS message,
  'warning' AS severity
FROM daily, stats
WHERE daily.qls >= 20
  AND daily.qls >= 3 * stats.avg_qls
ORDER BY daily.d DESC

panels.title: Weekly QLs by Motion
panels.sql:
SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', DATE_TRUNC(date, WEEK(MONDAY))) AS ql_week,
  COALESCE(motion, 'Other') AS motion,
  SUM(IFNULL(num_qls, 0)) AS qls
FROM {{REVENUE_FUNNEL}}
WHERE date >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND date <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Weekly QLs by Persona
panels.sql:
WITH contact_job_functions AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(hs_object_id AS INT64) AS contact_id,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')), '[') THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(INITCAP(TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(jobfunctions, r'"([^"]+)"'))), ''), 'Unknown')
      WHEN STRPOS(COALESCE(jobfunctions, ''), ';') > 0 THEN INITCAP(TRIM(SPLIT(jobfunctions, ';')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]))
      WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')) NOT IN ('', 'null', '[]') THEN INITCAP(TRIM(jobfunctions))
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS job_function
  FROM {{HS_RAW}}
)
SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', DATE_TRUNC(DATE(c.date_entered_mql), WEEK(MONDAY))) AS ql_week,
  COALESCE(cjf.job_function, 'Unknown') AS persona,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) AS qls
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN contact_job_functions cjf ON c.contact_id = cjf.contact_id
WHERE c.date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  AND c.date_entered_mql <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Weekly QLs by Lead Source
panels.sql:
SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date_entered_mql), WEEK(MONDAY))) AS ql_week,
  COALESCE(channel, 'Unknown') AS lead_source,
  COUNT(DISTINCT contact_id) AS qls
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}}
WHERE date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(date_entered_mql) >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND DATE(date_entered_mql) <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  AND date_entered_mql <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: QL Drill-Down (last 500 QLs in range)
panels.sql:
WITH contact_job_functions AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(hs_object_id AS INT64) AS contact_id,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')), '[') THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(INITCAP(TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(jobfunctions, r'"([^"]+)"'))), ''), 'Unknown')
      WHEN STRPOS(COALESCE(jobfunctions, ''), ';') > 0 THEN INITCAP(TRIM(SPLIT(jobfunctions, ';')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]))
      WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')) NOT IN ('', 'null', '[]') THEN INITCAP(TRIM(jobfunctions))
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS job_function
  FROM {{HS_RAW}}
)
SELECT
  TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(r.firstname, ''), ' ', COALESCE(r.lastname, ''))) AS full_name,
  c.email,
  COALESCE(cjf.job_function, 'Unknown') AS persona,
  COALESCE(c.channel, 'Unknown') AS lead_source,
  CASE
    WHEN REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(r.jobtitle), r'\\bcto\\b|\\bceo\\b|\\bcio\\b|\\bcdo\\b|\\bciso\\b|chief ') THEN 'C-Level'
    WHEN REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(r.jobtitle), r'\\bvp\\b|vice president') THEN 'VP'
    WHEN REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(r.jobtitle), r'director') THEN 'Director'
    WHEN REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(r.jobtitle), r'manager|head of') THEN 'Manager'
    WHEN REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(r.jobtitle), r'\\bsenior\\b|\\bsr\\.') THEN 'Senior IC'
    WHEN r.jobtitle IS NULL OR TRIM(r.jobtitle) = '' THEN 'Unknown'
    ELSE 'IC'
  END AS seniority,
  r.jobtitle AS job_title,
  COALESCE(r.company, '') AS company,
  c.ql_score,
  c.company_fit_score AS fit,
  DATE(c.date_entered_mql) AS ql_date
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN contact_job_functions cjf ON c.contact_id = cjf.contact_id
LEFT JOIN {{HS_RAW}} r ON CAST(r.hs_object_id AS INT64) = c.contact_id
WHERE c.date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  AND c.date_entered_mql <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
ORDER BY c.date_entered_mql DESC
LIMIT 500

panels.title: Nurture Candidates (Fit 4+, QL'd in 14d, QL Score <7)
panels.sql:
WITH contact_job_functions AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(hs_object_id AS INT64) AS contact_id,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')), '[') THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(INITCAP(TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(jobfunctions, r'"([^"]+)"'))), ''), 'Unknown')
      WHEN STRPOS(COALESCE(jobfunctions, ''), ';') > 0 THEN INITCAP(TRIM(SPLIT(jobfunctions, ';')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]))
      WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')) NOT IN ('', 'null', '[]') THEN INITCAP(TRIM(jobfunctions))
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS job_function
  FROM {{HS_RAW}}
)
SELECT
  TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(r.firstname, ''), ' ', COALESCE(r.lastname, ''))) AS contact_name,
  c.email,
  COALESCE(r.company, '') AS company,
  COALESCE(cjf.job_function, 'Unknown') AS persona,
  c.company_fit_score AS fit,
  CAST(SAFE_CAST(r.new_2026_ql_score AS FLOAT64) AS FLOAT64) AS ql_score,
  DATE(c.date_entered_mql) AS ql_date,
  COALESCE(r.lifecycle_stage_name, '') AS stage
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN contact_job_functions cjf ON c.contact_id = cjf.contact_id
LEFT JOIN {{HS_RAW}} r ON CAST(r.hs_object_id AS INT64) = c.contact_id
WHERE c.company_fit_score >= 4
  AND SAFE_CAST(r.new_2026_ql_score AS FLOAT64) IS NOT NULL
  AND SAFE_CAST(r.new_2026_ql_score AS FLOAT64) < 7
  AND cjf.job_function IS NOT NULL AND cjf.job_function != 'Unknown'
  AND c.date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
  AND c.date_entered_mql <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
ORDER BY c.company_fit_score DESC, SAFE_CAST(r.new_2026_ql_score AS FLOAT64) DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Weekly SALs by Channel
panels.sql:
SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', DATE_TRUNC(DATE(c.date_entered_sal), WEEK(MONDAY))) AS sal_week,
  COALESCE(c.channel, 'Unknown') AS channel,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) AS sals
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
WHERE c.date_entered_sal IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_sal) >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_sal) <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  AND c.date_entered_sal <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Weekly SALs by Persona
panels.sql:
WITH contact_job_functions AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(hs_object_id AS INT64) AS contact_id,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')), '[') THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(INITCAP(TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(jobfunctions, r'"([^"]+)"'))), ''), 'Unknown')
      WHEN STRPOS(COALESCE(jobfunctions, ''), ';') > 0 THEN INITCAP(TRIM(SPLIT(jobfunctions, ';')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]))
      WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')) NOT IN ('', 'null', '[]') THEN INITCAP(TRIM(jobfunctions))
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS job_function
  FROM {{HS_RAW}}
)
SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', DATE_TRUNC(DATE(c.date_entered_sal), WEEK(MONDAY))) AS sal_week,
  COALESCE(cjf.job_function, 'Unknown') AS persona,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) AS sals
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN contact_job_functions cjf ON c.contact_id = cjf.contact_id
WHERE c.date_entered_sal IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_sal) >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_sal) <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  AND c.date_entered_sal <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: QL → SAL Conversion % by Persona (weekly)
panels.sql:
WITH contact_job_functions AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(hs_object_id AS INT64) AS contact_id,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')), '[') THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(INITCAP(TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(jobfunctions, r'"([^"]+)"'))), ''), 'Unknown')
      WHEN STRPOS(COALESCE(jobfunctions, ''), ';') > 0 THEN INITCAP(TRIM(SPLIT(jobfunctions, ';')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]))
      WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')) NOT IN ('', 'null', '[]') THEN INITCAP(TRIM(jobfunctions))
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS job_function
  FROM {{HS_RAW}}
)
SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', DATE_TRUNC(DATE(c.date_entered_mql), WEEK(MONDAY))) AS week,
  COALESCE(cjf.job_function, 'Unknown') AS persona,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.date_entered_sal IS NOT NULL THEN c.contact_id END),
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id)
  ) * 100, 1) AS conversion_pct
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN contact_job_functions cjf ON c.contact_id = cjf.contact_id
WHERE c.date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  AND c.date_entered_mql <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY 1, 2
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) >= 3
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: QL → SAL Conversion Heatmap by Persona (last 8 weeks)
panels.sql:
WITH contact_job_functions AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(hs_object_id AS INT64) AS contact_id,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')), '[') THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(INITCAP(TRIM(REGEXP_EXTRACT(jobfunctions, r'"([^"]+)"'))), ''), 'Unknown')
      WHEN STRPOS(COALESCE(jobfunctions, ''), ';') > 0 THEN INITCAP(TRIM(SPLIT(jobfunctions, ';')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]))
      WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(jobfunctions, '')) NOT IN ('', 'null', '[]') THEN INITCAP(TRIM(jobfunctions))
      ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS job_function
  FROM {{HS_RAW}}
)
SELECT
  FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', DATE_TRUNC(DATE(c.date_entered_mql), WEEK(MONDAY))) AS week,
  COALESCE(cjf.job_function, 'Unknown') AS persona,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.date_entered_sal IS NOT NULL THEN c.contact_id END),
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id)
  ) * 100, 1) AS conversion_pct
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN contact_job_functions cjf ON c.contact_id = cjf.contact_id
WHERE c.date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 8 WEEK)
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) < CURRENT_DATE()
  AND c.date_entered_mql <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY 1, 2
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) >= 3
ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.title: QL Aging by Owner (pending QLs)
panels.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(CONCAT(o.firstname, ' ', o.lastname), c.hubspot_owner_id, 'Unassigned') AS owner_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(c.date_entered_mql), DAY) <= 1 THEN c.contact_id END) AS d_0_1,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(c.date_entered_mql), DAY) BETWEEN 2 AND 3 THEN c.contact_id END) AS d_2_3,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(c.date_entered_mql), DAY) BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN c.contact_id END) AS d_4_7,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(c.date_entered_mql), DAY) > 7 THEN c.contact_id END) AS d_7_plus,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) AS pending
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN {{HS_OWNERS}} o ON o.id = c.hubspot_owner_id
LEFT JOIN {{HS_RAW}} r ON CAST(r.hs_object_id AS INT64) = c.contact_id
WHERE c.lifecycle_stage_name = 'MQL'
  AND c.date_entered_sal IS NULL
  AND c.date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL
  AND c.date_entered_mql <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
  AND LOWER(COALESCE(r.lifecycle_stage_name, r.lifecyclestage, '')) NOT LIKE '%recycl%'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY pending DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: QL Conversion by Owner (selected range)
panels.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(CONCAT(o.firstname, ' ', o.lastname), c.hubspot_owner_id, 'Unassigned') AS owner_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) AS assigned,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.date_entered_sal IS NOT NULL THEN c.contact_id END) AS accepted,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.date_entered_sal IS NULL AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN c.contact_id END) AS likely_rejected,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.date_entered_sal IS NOT NULL THEN c.contact_id END),
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id)
  ) * 100, 1) AS acceptance_rate
FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
LEFT JOIN {{HS_OWNERS}} o ON o.id = c.hubspot_owner_id
WHERE c.date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
  AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
  AND c.date_entered_mql <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY assigned DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: QL Rejection Reasons (this period vs prior period)
panels.sql:
WITH this_period AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(r.hs_lead_status), ''), 'Unknown') AS reason,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) AS cnt
  FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
  LEFT JOIN {{HS_RAW}} r ON CAST(r.hs_object_id AS INT64) = c.contact_id
  WHERE c.date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL
    AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) >= DATE('{{dateStart}}')
    AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) <= DATE('{{dateEnd}}')
    AND c.date_entered_mql <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
    AND c.date_entered_sal IS NULL
    AND c.lifecycle_stage_name != 'MQL'
  GROUP BY 1
),
prev_period AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(r.hs_lead_status), ''), 'Unknown') AS reason,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) AS cnt
  FROM {{HS_CONTACTS}} c
  LEFT JOIN {{HS_RAW}} r ON CAST(r.hs_object_id AS INT64) = c.contact_id
  WHERE c.date_entered_mql IS NOT NULL
    AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) >= DATE_SUB(DATE('{{dateStart}}'), INTERVAL DATE_DIFF(DATE('{{dateEnd}}'), DATE('{{dateStart}}'), DAY) + 1 DAY)
    AND DATE(c.date_entered_mql) < DATE('{{dateStart}}')
    AND c.date_entered_mql <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
    AND c.date_entered_sal IS NULL
    AND c.lifecycle_stage_name != 'MQL'
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(t.reason, p.reason) AS reason,
  COALESCE(t.cnt, 0) AS this_period,
  COALESCE(p.cnt, 0) AS prev_period,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(
    COALESCE(t.cnt, 0) - COALESCE(p.cnt, 0),
    NULLIF(COALESCE(p.cnt, 0), 0)
  ) * 100, 1) AS wow_delta
FROM this_period t
FULL OUTER JOIN prev_period p USING (reason)
ORDER BY this_period DESC, prev_period DESC
LIMIT 30
